use_cases: Food delivery apps to filter restaurants by cuisine preferences
Recipe websites to capture user taste preferences
Restaurant discovery apps for personalized recommendations
Meal planning applications for dietary customization
Food content platforms for audience segmentation
ai_summary: A multi-select cuisine preference selector with animated dark-themed chips built using framer-motion. Users can select multiple cuisines from a list of 24 global options with smooth layout transitions when items reflow. Features hover, tap, and selection state animations with a dark charcoal color scheme. Ideal for food-related applications requiring cuisine filtering or preference collection.
